text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Cover it with soil, and I'm all done.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think I broke a sweat. Now's a good time
for a break.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Warm sunshine... The smell of fresh soil...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Nishino Flower falls into blissful
sleep and misses her training session.
